elements.name: Redundant Springs
elements.text: In designs and applications where spring failure would result in a hazard, the springs shall be redundant.
elements.rationale: if one spring breaks, then functionality can be maintained

elements.name: Spring Fracture Control
elements.text: In designs and applications where spring failure would result in a hazard and not redundant, the springs shall be designed, evaluated, and used under an acceptable fracture control program (reference NASA-STD-5003)

elements.name: Positive Status Indication
elements.text: All movable mechanical systems shall provide positive indication that the mechanism has achieved its desired position (i.e., ready-to-latch, latched).
elements.guidance: status such as ready to latch, latched, etc

elements.name: End of Travel Stops
elements.text: End of travel stops shall be provided for all movable mechanical systems.
elements.guidance: non-jamming, obviously not for continuously rotating systems
elements.rationale: stops prevent motion beyond what is intended
